'''rabomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnaeion|mnaeion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnaeion|mnaeion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rabomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræbemeth|ræbemeth]] || [[word:ræbemej|ræbemej]] || [[word:ræbemesh|ræbemesh]] || [[word:ræbeme|ræbeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabobomoth|rabobomoth]] || [[word:rabobomoj|rabobomoj]] || [[word:rabobomosh|rabobomosh]] || [[word:rabobomo|rabobomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabomoth|rabomoth]] || [[word:rabomoj|rabomoj]] || [[word:rabomosh|rabomosh]] || [[word:rabomo|rabomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabofmoth|rabofmoth]] || [[word:rabofmoj|rabofmoj]] || [[word:rabofmosh|rabofmosh]] || [[word:rabofmof|rabofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rabomotho|rabomotho]] || [[word:rabomojo|rabomojo]] || [[word:rabomosho|rabomosho]] || [[word:rabomoko|rabomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rabomoth|rabomoth]] || [[word:rabomoj|rabomoj]] || [[word:rabomosh|rabomosh]] || [[word:rabomo|rabomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rabomothol|rabomothol]] || [[word:rabomojol|rabomojol]] || [[word:rabomoshol|rabomoshol]] || [[word:rabomokol|rabomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rabomothotho|rabomothotho]] || [[word:rabomojojo|rabomojojo]] || [[word:rabomoshosho|rabomoshosho]] || [[word:rabomoko|rabomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rabomothon|rabomothon]] || [[word:rabomojon|rabomojon]] || [[word:rabomoshon|rabomoshon]] || [[word:rabomokon|rabomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rabomothoro|rabomothoro]] || [[word:rabomojoro|rabomojoro]] || [[word:rabomoshoro|rabomoshoro]] || [[word:rabomokoro|rabomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
